description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a rectangular layout. The exterior features a combination of light wood paneling and white walls, with large glass windows and sliding doors providing ample natural light. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, a paved patio area, and a well-maintained lawn bordered by tall, slender trees and privacy hedges. The front of the bungalow has a garage and a fenced yard, while the rear is more open and designed for outdoor leisure. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible kitchen and living spaces adjacent to the outdoor area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimalism, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a private pool, and a mix of wood and white exterior finishes. The design features open-plan living and a landscaped backyard with patio and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance, fenced yard, and a clear view of the backyard with pool and patio.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of tall trees, privacy hedge, and the open-plan kitchen area adjacent to the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the backyard, pool, and the extensive glass windows and doors along the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the kitchen, dining area, and the open backyard with pool and patio furniture.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors along the rear facade
